summary: Great performance captured on a mixed‑quality matrix recording—some love it, others find it subpar.
review: Both reviewers agree the concert itself is strong, describing it as a great show. Opinions diverge sharply on the matrix source: one reviewer calls this MTX “not one of the few I like,” while another says they “love this matrix.” The recording is a matrix mix, resulting in mixed technical impressions despite the solid musical performance.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is consistently praised, yielding a high show score; recording quality receives both positive and negative feedback, lowering its contribution. Weighted combination (70% show, 30% recording) produces an overall rating of ~4.2.

recording_quality.technical_notes: One reviewer dislikes the matrix sound, calling it not among their favorites; another enthusiastically praises the matrix, indicating a split perception of clarity and mix quality.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers highlighted the overall concert as great but gave no specific comments on set structure or song flow.
